name_en: Genuine leather grain texture, soft and premium—those who touch it will understand. BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 New Men's Intrecciato Camera Bag features grain leather paired with classic weaving, elevating the texture and durability. The matte finish is perfect for autumn and winter outfits. In terms of capacity, this bag is no less impressive than others, with an interior compartment for easy storage of essentials.

Size: 29*19.5*7.5cm
